name: PriceRadar
pitch: Know when your competitor changes pricing before your prospect does.

core_features.desc: Email + password login, bcrypt hashing, Flask-Login session management
Competitor management: name, pricing page URL, notes
Scheduled job that scrapes the pricing page, extracts an HTML snapshot, and detects diffs against the previous version
Email notification when a change is detected, with a visual diff (before/after) highlighted
Competitor snapshot history with a visual timeline of every detected change

db_tables.name: users
db_tables.columns: id PK, email UNIQUE, password_hash, created_at

db_tables.name: competitors
db_tables.columns: id PK, user_id FK, name, pricing_url, notes, created_at

db_tables.name: snapshots
db_tables.columns: id PK, competitor_id FK, html_hash, content_text, captured_at

db_tables.name: changes
db_tables.columns: id PK, snapshot_id FK, diff_html, notified_at, created_at

routes.desc: landing page com pitch e CTA de cadastro
adiciona concorrente com URL de pricing
exibe diff visual antes/depois da mudança

pricing_plan.free: até 3 concorrentes monitorados, check a cada 72h, histórico de 30 dias
pricing_plan.pro: até 20 concorrentes, check a cada 12h, histórico ilimitado, diff por email em tempo real — R$47/mês
